sentiment.reasoning: Regulatory review of core logistics practices introduces operational risk and potential costs, creating significant uncertainty about future compliance and efficiency.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
